commit_message: fix(admin): harden auth context and ledger-only credits
pr_title: fix(admin): harden auth context and ledger-only credits
pr_body: Final Issue #516 admin runtime hardening. Uses request-local admin context, maps API keys as auth source, keeps ADMIN_API_KEY as guarded bootstrap only, and blocks direct credit patches outside the ledger adjustment route.
